title: Mobi's Utils
description: A small collection of little Quality of Life features / improvements
body:
### Minecraft Version: **1.13.X** - **26.1** * It may be possible to use this Plugin in other versions, then those who are officially supported. --- # A small collection of little Quality of Life features / improvements ## Commands: ### /craft Usage: **/craft** Description: Opens up a mobile full-size Crafting-Table. No need to always carry a Crafting-Table with you anymore! 


### /echest Usage: **/echest** Description: Opens up a mobile Ender-Chest. Its basically like a Backpack! 


  ### /heal Usage: **/heal** or **/heal ** Description: Refills your or another players health and food-bar.


  ### /fly Usage: **/fly** or **/fly on**|**off** Description: Allows you to fly, even if you are in Survival-mode!


### /gm Usage: **/gm** or  **/gm 0**|**1**|**2**|**3** Description: Changes your game mode. It's just a lot quicker to type! If no number is given it will toggle between Creative and Survival.


### /beacon Usage: **/beacon** or **/beacon ** Description: Spawns a Beacon at your current position with a specific level. If no level is given it will spawn a Beacon level 1.


### /rocket Usage: **/rocket** Aliases: **/boost**, **/jump** Description: Launches you in the air! (R-clicking a Firework-rocket does the same)


### /customrocket Usage: **/customrocket ** Description: Lets you disable the custom rocket behaviour


### /lastdeath Usage: **/lastdeath** Aliases: **/ld** Description: Prints the Location, Cause & Level difference of the last saved Death


Every command listed needs Permissions to be used except: **/craft**, **/echest** and **/rocket**.
**** represent required arguments, [arg] represent optional arguments


## Other Features: Instead of using **/rocket** you can just craft a normal **Firework and R-click** it to launch yourself into the air! But be aware every Firework-rocket has a **25% chance of breaking** (configurable in the config). (Sneak + R-click to place the Firework normally) When someone dies, a **reworked Death-message** will be sent, displaying the **cause**, **location** and the **EX-Points** they had and how many of them dropped. Then list it again later using **/lastdeath** (configurable in the config)




**Note: I am developing this Plugin in my spare time, consistent updates and new features are not guaranteed. Features and Bug fixes are implemented mostly based on personal need and/or seventy of a Problem.**
